params.prompt: 3D rendered character still, cinematic studio lighting: a small living FLAME elemental creature ('Ember') — her entire body is made of swirling, dancing fire, orange-to-amber flames licking upward into wisps at her crown, with two bright white-hot glowing eyes and a hint of a confident smile in the fire. She stands leaning slightly forward with spark-trails rising around her, on dark charred ground with scattered glowing embers. One bold accent color: warm ember orange #ff7a18. Near-black background with subtle volumetric orange rim light and rising ember particles, soft heat-haze glow around her silhouette. Premium award-winning 3D render, Pixar-quality character still, energetic but warm and friendly, centered-right composition with generous negative space on the left for headline text.
